---
title: "Md. Jubayer Hossain"
image: profile.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hossainmj/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/hossainlab
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JHossain_28
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Hello, I am *Md. Jubayer Hossain*. Public Health Researcher with a demonstrated history of working in a health research organization. Skilled in team management, data analysis, and scientific writing.

I am the founder of [CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/), a non-profit organization dedicated to health research to improve lives in Bangladesh. I aspire to maximize the quality of life of the human around me by working at the intersection of education, technology, and health research.

Python is my primary language for data analysis and machine learning. I also have a basic understanding of R, Julia, SPSS, QGIS, and SQL.

:::
